relevantSections: Security Rule — technical safeguards for ePHI

keyDataTypes.protection: Column-level encryption, strict RBAC, audit logging, data masking for non-clinical access
Encryption at rest, access controls, de-identification for research
Encryption in transit (HL7/FHIR over TLS), access controls
Tokenization of IC numbers, encryption, DLP
Strong encryption, access controls, de-identification, consent management

interoperabilityStandards.description: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources — RESTful API standard for health data exchange
securityRequirements: TLS 1.2+ for all FHIR API calls
OAuth 2.0 / SMART on FHIR for authorization
Audit logging of all FHIR resource access

interoperabilityStandards.description: Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine
securityRequirements: De-identification of DICOM headers for research

interoperabilityStandards.description: Legacy health message format still widely used in Malaysia
securityRequirements: VPN or TLS for HL7v2 transport
